appraisal_events.evidence: « …un des membres les plus élégants du Jockey-Club, ami préféré du comte de Paris et du prince de Galles, un des hommes les plus choyés de la haute société du faubourg Saint-Germain. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator reveals that Swann, under a domestic incognito, belongs to the worldly elite and benefits from prestigious alliances, which clearly elevates him in this scene.

status_effects.explanation: The description insists on his membership and his favor in the highest society, which clearly increases his local position.
